nasb.text: When he had gone back up and had broken the bread and eaten, he talked with them a long while until daybreak, and then left.

esv.text: And when Paul had gone up and had broken bread and eaten, he conversed with them a long while, until daybreak, and so departed.

cnv.text: 隨即回到樓上，擘餅吃了，又講了很久，直到天亮才走。

ccb.text: 保罗说完就回到楼上，与大家一同掰饼、用餐，又谈了很久，直到天亮才离去。

csbs.text: 保罗再上去，掰饼吃了，又交谈了许久，直到天亮才出发。
